title: Coloring of Columns
excerpt: Being able to use different colors to mark the columns will assist users while completing/viewing boards

posts.author: MoAris (Moisis Aristidou)
posts.cookedHtml: Being able to use different colors to mark the columns will assist users while completing/viewing boards

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MoAris !

Welcome to the community! There is a similar post to what you are referring to here!

This one has 110 votes and voting on topics like yours helps the monday.com team understand what is in demand.

posts.author: hollyvera (Holly Duque)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree 100%!!! We need more votes on this!!

posts.author: Binatica (Binatica)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi folks!
Introducing Color Columns: Transform Your Monday Boards with Vibrant Visuals!

After 4 long years (!!) of anticipation, we are thrilled to introduce Color Columns, the revolutionary app that will give you the capability to color your columns.
Your wait is finally over.

Download now: https://monday.com/marketplace/10000308

You can take a look at our website: Binatica - Color Columns

Let’s paint a brighter, more efficient future for your team together!
#ColorColumns #MondayMagic #ProductivityBoost
